data.title: Babylist Announces Second Showroom in New York City's Soho, Bringing Its Immersive Parenting Experience to the East Coast
data.description: Babylist, a prominent platform for expecting and new families, has announced the opening of its second Showroom in OAKLAND, Calif. The Showroom, spanning 20,000 square feet, comes as a part of the company's strategic expansion following the success of its flagship location in Beverly Hills. The Showroom aims to provide an experiential space for customers to explore and engage with the brand. This move signifies Babylist's commitment to enhancing its presence and offerings, catering to the needs of its growing customer base.

data.title: Roche receives FDA 510(k) clearance for cobas® c703 and cobas® ISE neo, next-generation analytical units enhancing efficiency and capability for laboratories
data.description: The cobas® c 703 and cobas® ISE neo analytical units have been designed to enhance laboratory workflows and elevate patient care by offering increased testing capacity and automation. The cobas® c 703 can conduct up to 2,000 tests per hour, while the cobas® ISE neo has a capacity of up to 70 reagent positions. These advancements in technology aim to improve efficiency in high-throughput testing processes.

data.title: Tamboran Farmout Pilot Area and BCDA Acreage for Significant Premium in Acreage Value
data.description: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tamboran Resources Corporation's CEO, Mr. Todd Abbott, announced a major transaction showcasing the value of their Beetaloo acreage. The deal, with an implied valuation surpassing recent market metrics, enables the company to boost operations while ensuring financial stability and retaining control of core assets. INPEX's investment in Beetaloo signifies a milestone for Tamboran Resources Corporation, listed on NYSE as TBN and ASX as TBN, as it positions them for accelerated growth.Character count: 399
KH Group secures EUR 33.5 million in funding with new agreements.

data.title: 3E Launches AI Platform and Comprehensive AI Solution Suite, Bringing Trusted Intelligence and Workflow Acceleration to Product Compliance
data.description: A company based in Carlsbad, California, known as 3E, has introduced a new AI platform along with a suite of AI solutions designed for product compliance. This launch includes intelligent software integrated with AI technology, data solutions optimized for agents, and individual AI agents tailored specifically for product compliance needs. The AI solutions provided by 3E are available in three deployment models, each utilizing multi-agent reasoning. This introduction sets a new benchmark for AI-driven solutions specialized in product compliance.

data.title: Inside The Viral 2026 Resurgence Of Ripple's 'Hypothetical' Listing Fee Story
data.description: In a story recounted by Ripple's CTO David Schwartz in 2023, an unspecified exchange demanded millions in fees to list XRP, a digital asset, which eventually comprised 20% of the exchange's total revenue following a deal with Ripple. In May 2023, Schwartz hinted at the unshared tale of Coinbase listing XRP, expressing it as the narrative he was unable to divulge. Later, he clarified that he was presenting a fabricated scenario where a nameless exchange declined to include XRP, despite its hypothetical repercussions. Schwartz's disclosure alluded to the potential impact of XRP's listing on exchanges. For the complete report, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: CN to Report First-Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: On March 30, 2026, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) announced that it will release its financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 29, 2026, before the market opens.

data.title: CitroTech Issues Letter to Shareholders
data.description: Denver-based CitroTech Inc. (NYSE AM: CITR), known for CitroTech® - the sole long-term fire inhibitor endorsed by the U.S. EPA's Safer Choice program, recently shared updates with its shareholders. The company anticipates rapid expansion after moving to NYSE American, a rare transition from the OTC in 2025. Furthermore, their leadership team has expanded to support this growth. CitroTech boasts proprietary intellectual property that allows for the most effective fire retardancy in its products.

data.title: Silvaco Announces Strategic Partnership with APEC to Advance Silicon Carbide Power Device Development
data.description: APEC has increased its utilization of Silvaco's Victory™ TCAD and EDA solutions in order to boost the advancement of next-gen power semiconductors. This expansion highlights the growing importance of these technologies in achieving innovative breakthroughs in the sector.

data.title: ServiceTitan Report Finds AI Adoption More Than Doubles Among Commercial Contractors as Firms Turn to Technology to Navigate Cost Pressures
data.description: Around 40% of contractors have noticed a significant AI impact, a notable increase from 17% in 2025. This shift indicates a growing trend towards technology-based operations within the industry.

data.title: Chinese Medical Association Publishing House Co., Ltd. Sheds Light on New Noninvasive Clues to Detect Portal Hypertension
data.description: In Bern, Switzerland, a recent review discusses the potential benefits of utilizing a combination of various ultrasound methods for the detection and evaluation of portal hypertension in individuals with liver cirrhosis. Portal hypertension, a severe complication stemming from liver cirrhosis, is characterized by a pressure gradient exceeding a certain threshold. This approach could prove pivotal in enhancing diagnostic accuracy and monitoring this condition effectively. The review underscores the importance of adopting multiple ultrasound techniques to tackle portal hypertension in liver cirrhosis cases.

data.title: SBB Research Group Foundation Awards Additional Grants to 3 Illinois Nonprofits
data.description: In Chicago, the SBB Research Group Foundation recently hosted three past grant recipients to provide progress updates on their community support initiatives. The Foundation extended additional grants to bolster the missions of each organization. Among the recipients, the Center for Independent Futures in Evanston, IL, collaborates with individuals with disabilities to promote independent living through personalized coaching, education, housing assistance, and other inclusive services.

data.title: Enzo Custom Accelerates Nationwide Expansion with Seven New Showrooms
data.description: A high-end brand specializing in custom menswear, Enzo Custom, headquartered in New York, has broadened its reach by entering new markets including Dallas, Houston, Nashville, Greenwich, and Short Hills. The expansion is a part of the company's strategy to increase its presence nationwide, with plans for further market penetration by 2026. The announcement was made on March 30, 2026, highlighting the brand's growth and ambition in catering to more customers across various regions.

data.title: Market analyst Bernstein predicts possible turnaround for crypto stocks before Q1 earnings. Stocks of Coinbase, Robinhood, and Figure currently down by around 60% from 2021 peak, with revenue and earnings forecasted to rise through 2027.
data.description: Cryptocurrency-related stocks such as Coinbase, Robinhood, and Figure are currently trading approximately 60% lower than their peak values from last year, according to Bernstein. Despite this decline, analysts project a positive outlook for these companies with expectations for growth in revenue and earnings continuing through the year 2027.

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands Announces Corporate Name Change to Nexera Technologies and New Nasdaq Ticker Symbol “NEXR”
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, March 30, 2026 - A well-known company, Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, trading on Nasdaq under the symbols JFBR and JFBRW, has recently rebranded itself as Nexera Technologies Ltd. This change, effective as of March 26, 2026, signifies the company's new focus on advanced technologies and homeland security solutions.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Above $100; Trump Hails 'Great Progress' In Iran Talks, Issues Threats
data.description: Futures saw an increase following President Trump's statements regarding a potential conflict with Iran, leading to a rise in oil prices exceeding $100. Despite this, the stock market showed a positive trend after enduring four consecutive weeks of losses. Investors are now looking forward to the upcoming Tesla delivery reports. Trump remains optimistic about the progress in talks with Iran while also issuing threats.

data.title: PrimeTech Launches to Scale AI-Driven Wall Framing
data.description: A recently established company named PrimeTech has been introduced as the successor to BamCore, aiming to revolutionize residential construction in North America. By merging BamCore's patented framing systems with decentralized fabrication methods, PrimeTech offers a unique solution for rapid, efficient, and eco-friendly building projects. The company is based in HINES, Ore., and their innovative approach is expected to significantly reduce labor requirements and carbon footprint. This announcement was made on March 30, 2026, and PrimeTech is set to bring about a transformative change in the construction industry in the region.

data.title: Baiya International Group Inc. Sets Sail, the Market Takes the Helm: The “Cryptocurrency Ark Plan” Begins with a Global Vote to Determine Its First Allocation Direction
data.description: Today, in Shenzhen, China, Baiya International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: BIYA), a leading human resource technology firm, introduced its Cryptocurrency Ark Plan. This innovative initiative includes a global voting mechanism to decide the allocation of digital assets in the company’s next phase. By combining market-driven choices with a disciplined approach, the Plan signifies a shift in asset allocation strategy. BIYA's cloud-based internet platform offers crowdsourcing recruitment and SaaS-enabled HR solutions.

data.title: Clean Energy Technologies Advances First Waste-to-Energy Deployment in Alberta Under LOI with Hoppy Power, Targeting Scalable Rollout
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CETY), a company specializing in clean energy solutions, revealed signing a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Hoppy Power Ltd. The agreement aims to explore and promote the use of CETY’s exclusive High Temperature Ablative Pyrolysis (HTAP ™) technology for waste-to-energy projects. This move signifies a step towards utilizing innovative solutions for converting waste and heat into power and fuels.
